# VantageTeam

> Fully managed AI agent teams for app development, dev maintenance, and marketing/SEO/content operations. Supervised by a tech executive with 25 years of experience.

## Services

- [Build an App](/en/build): AI-powered app development from idea to production in 4-8 weeks. From $2,990. Revenue share model.
- [AI Dev Team](/en/dev): Ongoing development, bug fixes, feature work via GitHub Issues. From $990/month. SLA-backed.
- [Agent Teams](/en/teams): Marketing, SEO, content, sales, email, and operations. From $990/month.

## Pricing

- Build packages: $2,990 - $19,990 one-time
- Dev team: $990 - $4,990/month
- Non-dev teams: $990 - $3,990/month

## Blog

- [We analyzed Browserbase — here's why it matters for AI testing](/blog/browserbase-strategy): Browserbase is managed headless browser infrastructure that gives AI agents eyes on the web. Platform breakdown, Stagehand SDK, and CI pipeline integration.
- [We watched 'How to Build $10k Agentic Workflows' — here's what we learned](/blog/10k-agentic-workflows): WAT framework for building and pricing agentic workflows — newsletter automation, value-based pricing, outcomes over hours.
- [We watched '50 Claude Code Tips from a Meta Staff Engineer' — here's what we learned](/blog/50-claude-code-tips): John Kim's 50 practical Claude Code tips — foundation setup, CLAUDE.md, keyboard shortcuts, compound engineering patterns.
